'; ls -1 tests/fixtures/recordings 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^/- /'

command: for f in tests/fixtures/recordings/web-mode-parity.json tests/parity/artifacts/web-mode-parity.json src/tests/integration/web-mode-parity-contract.test.ts; do if [ -e "$f" ]; then echo "EXISTS $f"; else echo "MISSING $f"; fi; done
printf 'WEB TESTS\n'; rg -n "web-mode|workspace-project-cwd|sidebar-current-scope|status-bar-unit|projects-panel|Web mode startup|Ready →" src tests | head -200
